form.formComment: Quickly out of the boxes with a slick early sectional clocking 19.43 with a one length win at Bulli over 340m. Can continue his winning ways.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time when third (18.64) at Dubbo, making it two placings on end. Has a low draw. Must be included.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last in a Grade 5 on March 28 over 400m at The Gardens behind That's Mine beaten 5 lengths (23.60). Comes through a solid form race. Expected to feature.

formComments.comment: Latest effort finished last in a Grade 5 on March 28 over 400m at The Gardens behind That's Mine beaten 5 lengths (23.60). Comes through a solid form race. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Nowra (21.31) in a Grade 5, finishing a 7 length sixth. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from five starts. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.
